SYAG Platform

Every security signal.
One place.

SYAG connects your guards, cameras, sensors, visitors, and incidents into a single operational picture — so you always know what's happening and can act fast.

No servers. No integrators. Live in 30 days.

Request a Demo → See Pricing →

One unified platform

Guards, visitors, incidents, and sensors — all connected in a single view.

Real-time visibility

See everything happening across your site, live.

Replace paper and WhatsApp

Digital logs, structured reports, and searchable records.

Faster response

Catch issues early and resolve them before they escalate.

What the platform covers

Six areas. Complete coverage.

Security Operations

Know about every incident. Act before it escalates.

Track every incident from first report to final resolution. Guards file reports from the field. Supervisors see live status. Nothing slips through.

  • — Report and track incidents from anywhere
  • — Assign issues to the right person and track resolution
  • — Receive real-time alerts the moment something goes wrong
  • — Live Operations Center across guards, sensors, and cameras

Workforce & Patrols

Full control over your guard force.

Manage shifts, verify patrols, and track attendance without phone calls or spreadsheets. Know who is on-site and whether they're doing their job.

  • — Schedule and manage guard shifts
  • — Track clock-ins, attendance, and performance
  • — Run patrols with QR checkpoint scanning for verified proof
  • — Assign daily tasks and confirm completion

Visitor & Access Control

Always know who is inside your facility.

Pre-register visitors, scan QR passes at entry, and track everyone in real time. Overstays and blacklisted individuals are flagged automatically.

  • — Pre-register visitors and send QR passes via WhatsApp
  • — Scan QR codes at entry points for fast, accurate check-in
  • — See who is inside at any moment
  • — Manage contractors, deliveries, and recurring visitors

Smart Monitoring

Your cameras and sensors, connected to one picture.

Cameras trigger incidents. Sensors send alerts. Equipment status is tracked automatically. No more logging into separate systems to check what's happening.

  • — Connect cameras — alerts and incidents are created automatically
  • — Monitor panic buttons, motion sensors, and environmental detectors
  • — Get alerted when devices go offline or need maintenance
  • — Track every asset from purchase to retirement

Reports & Records

Replace paper. Keep complete records.

Every guard action, patrol, incident, and visitor movement is logged digitally and time-stamped. Search and export anything, anytime.

  • — Tamper-proof digital logs replacing paper registers
  • — Auto-generated shift summaries and patrol completion reports
  • — Search and export records at any time
  • — Full audit history for compliance requirements

Administration & Setup

Configure everything without IT support.

Set up your site, define rules, and manage permissions yourself — using a visual no-code builder. No developer or system integrator required.

  • — Manage users and set role-based permissions
  • — Configure sites, gates, checkpoints, and zones
  • — Build automation rules visually — no code required
  • — Control alerts, categories, and response workflows

How it works

Capture. Monitor. Act.

Step 1

Capture

Guards file reports and scan patrol checkpoints from their phones. Cameras and sensors feed events directly into the platform — automatically.

Step 2

Monitor

Supervisors and managers see everything in real time — guard locations, open incidents, visitor activity, and sensor status — in one live screen.

Step 3

Act

Teams receive alerts, dispatch guards, and resolve incidents faster. Every action is logged, time-stamped, and searchable.

Why it matters

Built for operational control.

Full Visibility

See everything happening across your site in real time — guards, visitors, incidents, and sensors in a single view.

Faster Response

Alerts reach the right person immediately. Teams respond in minutes, not hours. Issues are closed with a full record attached.

Operational Control

Guards follow schedules, complete patrols, and log activity — with verified proof you can review at any time.

Clear Accountability

Every action is tracked and time-stamped. You always know who did what, when — with no room for disputes.

Less Admin Work

Shift reports, patrol logs, and visitor records are generated automatically. No manual data entry, no paper chasing.

Ready in 30 Days

No servers, no integrators, no capital cost. Set up your site yourself and go live in weeks, not months.

Three interfaces, one platform

The right view for every role.

Guards

Mobile App

Clock in, scan patrol checkpoints, file incident reports, and receive dispatch instructions — from any entry-level Android phone. Arabic and English.

Supervisors

Mobile + Web

See the live guard map, approve incident reports, review patrol logs, and receive escalation alerts — from phone or browser.

Facility Managers

Web Dashboard

Configure sites, manage user access, review operational reports, and set automation rules — all from a single admin interface.

One platform. Complete control.

SYAG brings every part of your security operation into one place — guards, visitors, incidents, cameras, and sensors. Simple to set up. Built to run every day.

No servers. No integrators. No surprises.
